mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id, r.room_nm, r.password, r.reg_id, DATE_FORMAT(r.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, CASE WHEN r.secret_yn = 'y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS secret_yn_bool, m.room_id AS m_room_id, m.reg_id AS m_reg_id, m.writer AS m_writer FROM chat_room_info r LEFT JOIN chat_member_info m ON r.room_id = m.room_id ORDER BY r.reg_dt DESC
SELECT room_id, room_nm, password, CASE WHEN secret_yn = 'y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS secret_yn_bool FROM chat_room_info WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_info (room_id, room_nm, secret_yn, password, reg_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{name}, #{secretYnChar}, #{password}, #{regId})
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, writer, message FROM chat_message_info WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY message_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message_info (room_id, writer, message, reg_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{writer}, #{message}, #{regId})
INSERT IGNORE INTO chat_member_info (room_id, reg_id, writer) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{regId}, #{writer})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_member_info WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND reg_id = #{regId}
